name: nanobots-refined
title: Nanobots: Early Bots Refined
author: foxoftheasterisk
description:
Early automated constrution bots.  A special emitter gun fires consumable nanobots to perform construction tasks. Also adds items which add new features to construction bots. Thanks to Nexela for creating the original mod and Regi_Mahler for updating it to 2.0. 

If migrating from Nanobots or Nanobots 2.0, I strongly recommend you view the changelog first.
